reviews.comment:
Como todas las semanas cargo combustible, luego compro en el autoservicio medialunas, galletitas twistos y caramelos sueltos. busco en las gondolas edulcorante y no habia, pido un sobrecito de las mesas y la cajera de mala manera me dice que son de los clientes que toman cafe, y me vende 5 sobrecitos marca cabrales a 20 pesos cada uno, suma que no es ingresada al ticket con la otra mercaderia, sino que se abona aparte. Pregunto si no rinden el dinero en un ticket quien se entera del ingreso del dinero? esto es asi? me extraña que una empresa como ypf se maneje de esta manera.
falta de cortesia para los clientes ya que el faltante del producto, se podria haber subsanado con un gesto de cortesía y no con el cobre en negro de mercaderia. ojala los encargados se enteren de la situacion.

(Translated by Google)
Like every week, I fill up my tank, then buy croissants, Twistos cookies, and loose candies at the convenience store. I looked for sweetener on the shelves and they weren't available, so I asked for a packet from the tables. The cashier rudely told me they were for customers who drink coffee, and sold me five Cabrales brand packets for 20 pesos each. This amount wasn't added to the receipt with the other items; I had to pay for them separately. I wonder, if they don't record the money on a receipt, who knows when it's being collected? Is this normal? It surprises me that a company like YPF operates this way. It's a lack of courtesy towards customers, since the product shortage could have been resolved with a simple courtesy, not by taking cash under the table. I hope the managers find out about this situation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQteFBhakVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar buena atención.  Los socios tienen amplio parque arbolado con comodidades otra descansar y tomar mate. La próxima me fijo si hay parrillas. El bar y atención mecánica muy buenasinstalaciones.EXCELENTE

(Translated by Google)
Good place, good service. Members have a large, wooded park with amenities, another place to relax and drink mate. Next time I'll check if they have grills. The bar and mechanical service are very good, and the facilities are excellent. EXCELLENT
